'''Rogar Farnoster''' was the acclaimed [[Author/Legends|author]] of ''[[The Slug Named Grendel]]''<ref name="SNG">{{WEGCite|story=The Slug Named Grendel (short story)|book=The Star Wars Sourcebook|reprint=1}}</ref> and ''[[Night Mynock]]'', the latter a [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] Top 5 seller.<ref name="HNN-45">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45||A Closer Look}}</ref> While researching for ''The Slug Named Grendel'', Farnoster accompanied [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Sedan Anang]] and other [[University of Sanbra]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] when they investigated a record-breaking 80-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] [[Exogorth/Legends|space slug]] found in the [[Borkeen Belt]].<ref name="HNN-54" />
